tagline: How Acme doubled their conversion rate in 60 days

challenge.headline: Low conversion rates were killing growth
challenge.description: Acme's landing pages were converting at just 1.2%, far below industry average. Every ad dollar spent was generating minimal returns.

solution.headline: Streamlined onboarding with a smarter funnel
solution.description: Using our platform, Acme identified friction points and rebuilt their entire conversion funnel in days — not months.

result.headline: 2× conversions in just 60 days
result.quote: This tool completely transformed how we think about our funnel. We saw results in the first week.
